126.reason: [If the character after '&' is not '&', pos was decremented then incremented twice, causing it to skip the next character; also, error handling writes file but does not stop parsing, possibly leading to further incorrect tokenization]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character after '&' is not '&', pos was decremented then incremented twice, causing it to skip the next character; also, error handling writes file but does not stop parsing, possibly leading to further incorrect tokenization]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character after '&' is not '&', pos was decremented and then incremented twice (once here and once in the else block's pos--), causing it to skip the next character or go out of bounds when at end of line]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character after '&' is not '&', pos was decremented and then incremented twice (once here and once in the else block's pos-- followed by this pos++), causing it to skip the next character incorrectly. More critically, if '&' is at the end of the line, line.charAt(pos) will throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [If the current character is '&', and it's at the end of the line (i.e., pos == line.length()), then accessing line.charAt(pos) will cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException. The code does not check bounds before accessing line.charAt(pos).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [If the character after '&' is not '&', pos was decremented and then incremented twice (once here and once from the initial pos++), causing it to skip the next character or go out of bounds when at end of line]

138.reason: [Same issue as above: incorrect pointer advancement after detecting single '|' leads to skipping the next character; also, lexical analysis should terminate or skip only the erroneous symbol properly]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: incorrect pointer advancement after detecting single '|' leads to skipping the next character; also, lexical analysis should terminate or skip only the erroneous symbol properly]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: double increment after pos-- leads to incorrect position advancement or IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos is at the last character]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: if '|' is at the end of the line, accessing line.charAt(pos) causes StringIndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, incorrect pointer advancement when handling single '|' or '&'.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as above: if '|' is the last character in the line, line.charAt(pos) will throw IndexOutOfBoundsException because pos is incremented before checking bounds.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue as with '&': incorrect pos adjustment leads to skipping characters or IndexOutOfBoundsException when '|' is at the end of a line]
